identity.name: Sinclair Ihuanyachukwu Nzenwata
identity.title: Full Stack Software Engineer | AI Systems Builder
identity.shortBio: Full-stack engineer building scalable products and AI-powered systems, with a focus on real-world impact and user-centered design.
identity.longBio: I am a full-stack software engineer focused on building scalable systems and intelligent applications that solve real-world problems. My work spans web, mobile, and AI-driven platforms, from multi-agent medical systems to production-ready marketplace infrastructure. I enjoy working at the intersection of system design, product thinking, and emerging technologies, and I am particularly interested in building tools that are both technically robust and meaningful to users.

intro.title: Scene 1 Intro
transcript: I’m a full-stack software engineer and AI systems builder focused on creating scalable products and intelligent tools with real-world impact.
My work spans web, mobile, and AI-driven systems, from marketplace infrastructure to multi-agent applications designed around reliability, usability, and meaningful outcomes.
This space is a simple archive of that work.
When you’re ready, move into the main room to explore my projects, experience, and background.

archive.title: Scene 2 Orientation
transcript: You’re now in the main archive.
In this space, you can stay centered and explore my work through a rotating experience carousel and a project wall.
The carousel introduces my background and professional experience.
The project wall highlights selected systems I’ve designed and built, including AI applications, platform infrastructure, and production-focused software.
Take your time, look around, and follow the work that interests you.

experience.summary: Build and deliver production-grade web and mobile applications for university faculty and stakeholders.
bullets: Developed scalable web applications using React and TypeScript, improving performance and maintainability.
Designed database architectures and implemented secure authentication systems using MySQL and Duo SSO.
Collaborated cross-functionally with designers, developers, and product managers to deliver real-world software solutions.

experience.summary: Building a full-stack marketplace platform enabling secure buying, selling, and service exchange.
bullets: Architected and developed a mobile-first marketplace using React Native and AdonisJS microservices.
Implemented REST APIs, Docker-based deployments, and CI/CD pipelines for production readiness.
Integrated authentication, push notifications, and email systems using Firebase, AWS SES, and Duo 2FA.

experience.summary: Developed core features for a school management system.
bullets: Built student management interfaces and integrated REST APIs.
Migrated a large React codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript, improving code quality and safety.

experience.summary: Built and deployed multiple AI-powered applications in a fast-paced environment.
bullets: Developed and deployed full-stack AI applications using Next.js and Firebase.
Applied agile workflows and CI/CD practices in collaborative team environments.

experience.summary: Worked on energy analytics and forecasting systems.
bullets: Built data pipelines and visualization tools for campus energy analysis.

projects.title: HealthConnect
projects.subtitle: Multi-Agent Medical QA System
projects.summary: AI-powered system delivering medically grounded answers using multi-agent LLM workflows.
projects.description: Built a multi-agent AI system that combines web search and medical literature retrieval to generate accurate, validated responses to user questions.
projects.role: Designed and built full system architecture, backend APIs, and agent workflows.
projects.challenge: Ensuring reliable and accurate responses from multiple LLM agents across different data sources.
projects.solution: Implemented structured multi-agent workflows using MCP and integrated PubMed plus web search for grounded responses.

projects.title: Naahia
projects.subtitle: Marketplace Platform
projects.summary: Full-stack marketplace platform for secure peer-to-peer transactions.
projects.description: Building a scalable marketplace that enables users to buy, sell, and offer services with secure authentication and real-time features.
projects.role: Co-founder and lead engineer responsible for architecture and development.
projects.challenge: Designing a scalable and secure system supporting multiple user interactions and services.
projects.solution: Implemented modular microservices, authentication layers, and CI/CD pipelines for reliable deployment.

projects.title: Admin Moderation System
projects.subtitle: Secure Admin Dashboard
projects.summary: Secure admin dashboard for managing user reports and platform activity.
projects.description: Built a full-featured moderation system with audit logs, real-time filtering, and secure access control.
projects.role: Designed and implemented backend and admin workflows.
projects.challenge: Ensuring secure admin access and maintaining a complete audit trail of actions.
projects.solution: Integrated Duo SSO with OIDC and designed normalized schemas for tracking moderation activity.

projects.title: Pantry Vision
projects.subtitle: AI Pantry Management App
projects.summary: AI-powered pantry management app with food recognition and recipe generation.
projects.description: Developed a full-stack application allowing users to track food items, scan products with a camera, and generate recipes using AI.
projects.role: Built frontend, backend, and AI integration.
projects.challenge: Integrating AI features and handling image-based input.
projects.solution: Used FileReader and Gemini API for image-based queries and AI-generated outputs.

projects.title: WillItRain
projects.subtitle: NASA Climate Mobile App
projects.summary: Mobile app predicting weather patterns using NASA climate data.
projects.description: Built during the NASA Space Apps Hackathon to analyze historical climate data and predict weather trends.
projects.role: Developed the mobile app and integrated the data analysis workflow.
projects.challenge: Working with large climate datasets and extracting meaningful predictions.
projects.solution: Used the NASA POWER API and data analysis techniques to generate forecasts.
